final_prompt.prompt:
Edit the attached image as a YouTube thumbnail background — 16:9.

Style/medium: photorealistic, dramatic, documentary-style
Composition:
  No cropping or cutting from any part of the image
  Full frame preserved as-is
Subject: the original image subject, fully intact
Scene/backdrop: as in the original image, no changes to content
Lighting/mood:
  Enhanced dramatic lighting
  Documentary-style mood
Color palette: color grading adjusted for dramatic, documentary look
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim):
Constraints:
  Do not crop, cut, or reframe any part of the original image
  Keep 16:9 aspect ratio
  Optimize for YouTube thumbnail use
Avoid: any cropping, any content removal, any composition changes
